channel.title: The Podcast
channel.description: Exploring the intersection of technology, culture, and creativity through thoughtful conversations with remarkable people.
channel.itunes:author: Your Name
channel.itunes:summary: Exploring the intersection of technology, culture, and creativity through thoughtful conversations with remarkable people.

item.title: EP 05: The Future of AI in Creative Industries
item.description: We sit down with leading researchers to explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping art, music, and storytelling.

item.title: EP 04: Building Products That People Actually Want
item.description: Product leaders from top startups share their frameworks for understanding user needs and building products that create real value.

item.title: EP 03: The Science of Decision Making
item.description: Why do we make the choices we make? A deep dive into behavioral science, cognitive biases, and practical strategies.

item.title: EP 02: Remote Work and the Future of Collaboration
item.description: How distributed teams are redefining workplace culture through tools, practices, and mindsets.

item.title: EP 01: Welcome - Why We Started This Podcast
item.description: In our debut episode, we share the story behind the podcast and what we hope to explore together.
